# BP-2 negative: wrapped error return
lang: go
file: BP-2-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"
)

// Load reads a file and wraps any read failure with path context.
func Load(path string) ([]byte, error) {
	data, err := os.ReadFile(path)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("load %s: %w", path, err)
	}
	return data, nil
}
